_metadata.description: Canonical reference values for Genesis PROV 6 Solid-State Battery verification
_metadata.source: Extracted from PROV_6_SOLID_STATE/CANONICAL_VALUES.json (single source of truth)

dendrite_suppression.biharmonic_factor_note: Allen-Cahn uses non-conserved order parameter (wrong model class for dendrite growth, which requires conserved Cahn-Hilliard). The 7.57x value is a model artifact, not a physical suppression factor.

ionic_conductivity.legacy_note: SUPERSEDED -- artifact of fitting beyond trajectory endpoint

quantum_sieve.Na_method: calibrated Born model (GROMACS PMF returned NaN)
quantum_sieve.mechanism: steric exclusion of solvated species; bare-ion selectivity is weak (~8%)

smart_fuse.best_config: ALD + SEBS, radius 10-15 um, thickness 50-100 nm

cycle_life.caveat: SEI growth rate is assumed, not derived from first principles. Uses legacy conductivity (0.477 mS/cm); corrected value would give lower retention.

external_pressure.note: Sufficient for interfacial contact only; below LLZO grain boundary K_IC
